name: subagents: review-react-rsc invocation produces findings in §2.3 format {severity, rule_id?, file, line, finding, suggested_fix}
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_runner.sh" --agent review-react-rsc --input "$PWD/file.tsx" --emit-findings "$PWD/findings.jsonl" && grep -E "severity.*file.*line.*finding" findings.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
